Entries.Name: Activity History
Entries.Detail: Records your activity across devices when signed into a Microsoft account and can sync it to the cloud. Disabling keeps activity local.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Activity History tracking is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Records your activity across devices when signed into a Microsoft account and can sync it to the cloud. Disabling keeps activity local.

Entries.Name: Advertising ID
Entries.Detail: Windows assigns a unique advertising ID to your account that apps can use to show targeted ads. Disabling stops this tracking.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Apps can show personalized ads using advertising ID
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Windows assigns a unique advertising ID to your account that apps can use to show targeted ads. Disabling stops this tracking.

Entries.Name: Auto Reboot on Crash (BSOD)
Entries.Detail: When Windows crashes (blue screen), it can automatically restart. Disabling keeps the error on screen so you can read the stop code.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Automatic reboot on crash is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: When Windows crashes (blue screen), it can automatically restart. Disabling keeps the error on screen so you can read the stop code.

Entries.Name: Auto Restart After Update
Entries.Detail: Prevents Windows from automatically restarting after installing updates without your input. Gives you control over when reboots happen.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Automatic restart after Windows Update is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Prevents Windows from automatically restarting after installing updates without your input. Gives you control over when reboots happen.

Entries.Name: Automatic Map Updates
Entries.Detail: Windows Maps can automatically download updated offline map data in the background. Disabling saves bandwidth if you do not use the Maps app.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Automatic offline map updates are enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Windows Maps can automatically download updated offline map data in the background. Disabling saves bandwidth if you do not use the Maps app.

Entries.Name: Online Speech Recognition
Entries.Detail: Allows apps to use Microsoft's online speech recognition services to process your voice. Disabling keeps speech processing local.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Online speech recognition is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Allows apps to use Microsoft's online speech recognition services to process your voice. Disabling keeps speech processing local.

Entries.Name: Narrator Online Services
Entries.Detail: Allows Narrator to use Microsoft cloud services for richer descriptions and voice features. Disabling keeps Narrator local.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Narrator online services are enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Allows Narrator to use Microsoft cloud services for richer descriptions and voice features. Disabling keeps Narrator local.

Entries.Name: Narrator Scripting Support
Entries.Detail: Allows Narrator to execute scripts for automation and custom functionality. Disabling keeps Narrator simpler and more local.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Narrator scripting support is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Allows Narrator to execute scripts for automation and custom functionality. Disabling keeps Narrator simpler and more local.

Entries.Name: Inking and Typing Personalization
Entries.Detail: Uses your typing history and handwriting patterns to improve text input suggestions. Disabling keeps that data local.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Inking and typing personalization is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Uses your typing history and handwriting patterns to improve text input suggestions. Disabling keeps that data local.

Entries.Name: Device Search History
Entries.Detail: Windows Search can store your search history locally on this device. Disabling prevents local search history from being saved.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Search history on this device is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Windows Search can store your search history locally on this device. Disabling prevents local search history from being saved.

Entries.Name: Cloud Content Search
Entries.Detail: Windows Search can show results from apps and services tied to your Microsoft account or work/school account. Disabling keeps search local.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Cloud content search is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Windows Search can show results from apps and services tied to your Microsoft account or work/school account. Disabling keeps search local.

Entries.Name: Block Workplace Join Messages
Entries.Detail: Blocks the prompts that let work or school accounts join this device or manage it from sign-in flows.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Workplace Join messages are shown
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Blocks the prompts that let work or school accounts join this device or manage it from sign-in flows.

Entries.Name: Prevent BitLocker Auto Encryption
Entries.Detail: Prevents Windows from automatically encrypting eligible devices with BitLocker during setup so encryption only happens when you choose it.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Automatic BitLocker device encryption is allowed
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Prevents Windows from automatically encrypting eligible devices with BitLocker during setup so encryption only happens when you choose it.

Entries.Name: Camera Access
Entries.Detail: Master toggle controlling whether apps can request access to your camera. Disabling prevents all apps from using the camera.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Camera access for apps is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Master toggle controlling whether apps can request access to your camera. Disabling prevents all apps from using the camera. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.

Entries.Name: Clipboard History
Entries.Detail: Stores a history of copied items so you can paste from previous clips using Win+V. Enable to turn this feature on.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Clipboard History is disabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Stores a history of copied items so you can paste from previous clips using Win+V. Enable to turn this feature on.

Entries.Name: Connected User Experiences (DiagTrack)
Entries.Description: Connected User Experiences and Telemetry service
Entries.Detail: The DiagTrack service collects and uploads Windows usage and diagnostic data to Microsoft servers. Disabling it stops background telemetry uploads.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Connected User Experiences and Telemetry service is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: The DiagTrack service collects and uploads Windows usage and diagnostic data to Microsoft servers. Disabling it stops background telemetry uploads. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.

Entries.Name: Device Sensors
Entries.Description: Accelerometer, gyroscope, and ambient light sensor
Entries.Detail: Controls access to hardware sensors like accelerometer, gyroscope, and ambient light sensor. Mainly relevant for tablets and convertible devices.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Sensor features (auto-rotation, etc.) are enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls access to hardware sensors like accelerometer, gyroscope, and ambient light sensor. Mainly relevant for tablets and convertible devices.

Entries.Name: Diagnostic Data Level
Entries.Detail: Controls how much diagnostic data Windows sends to Microsoft. Minimal sends only basic device info and reliability data.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Diagnostic data collection set to Default
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls how much diagnostic data Windows sends to Microsoft. Minimal sends only basic device info and reliability data.

Entries.Name: Diagnostics Tracking Tasks
Entries.Detail: Several scheduled tasks run in the background to collect and upload diagnostic data. Disabling stops these tasks from running automatically.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Diagnostics tracking scheduled tasks are enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Several scheduled tasks run in the background to collect and upload diagnostic data. Disabling stops these tasks from running automatically. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.

Entries.Name: Display and Sleep Timeouts
Entries.Detail: Controls when the display turns off and when the PC enters sleep mode after inactivity. Disable to prevent automatic sleep.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Display and sleep mode timeouts are enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls when the display turns off and when the PC enters sleep mode after inactivity. Disable to prevent automatic sleep.

Entries.Name: Driver Updates via Windows Update
Entries.Description: Offering of drivers through Windows Update
Entries.Detail: Controls whether Windows Update automatically downloads and installs hardware drivers. Disabling lets you manage drivers manually.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Drivers offered via Windows Update
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls whether Windows Update automatically downloads and installs hardware drivers. Disabling lets you manage drivers manually. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.

Entries.Name: Fast Startup
Entries.Detail: A hybrid shutdown mode that saves the kernel state to disk so Windows boots faster. Can cause issues with dual-boot setups or full shutdowns.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Fast Startup is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: A hybrid shutdown mode that saves the kernel state to disk so Windows boots faster. Can cause issues with dual-boot setups or full shutdowns.

Entries.Name: Feedback Frequency
Entries.Description: How often Windows asks for feedback
Entries.Detail: Controls how often Windows asks you to rate your experience or submit feedback. Setting to Never stops all feedback prompts.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Feedback frequency set to Automatically
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls how often Windows asks you to rate your experience or submit feedback. Setting to Never stops all feedback prompts.

Entries.Name: Language List Access for Websites
Entries.Detail: Allows websites to read your Windows language preference list to tailor content. Disable to prevent websites from detecting your language settings.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Websites can access language list
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Allows websites to read your Windows language preference list to tailor content. Disable to prevent websites from detecting your language settings.

Entries.Name: Location Services
Entries.Detail: Controls whether apps can access your device's geographic location. Disabling prevents location tracking by all apps.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Location access for apps is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls whether apps can access your device's geographic location. Disabling prevents location tracking by all apps. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.

Entries.Name: Lock Screen Widgets
Entries.Description: Windows Web Experience Pack (widgets and lock screen)
Entries.Detail: The Windows Web Experience Pack adds widgets and dynamic content to the lock screen and taskbar. Disabling removes these.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Windows Web Experience Pack (widgets) is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: The Windows Web Experience Pack adds widgets and dynamic content to the lock screen and taskbar. Disabling removes these.

Entries.Name: Maintenance Wake-up
Entries.Detail: Windows can wake your PC from sleep overnight to run automatic maintenance tasks. Disabling prevents unwanted overnight wake-ups.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Nightly wake-up for automatic maintenance is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Windows can wake your PC from sleep overnight to run automatic maintenance tasks. Disabling prevents unwanted overnight wake-ups.

Entries.Name: Malicious Software Removal Tool (MSRT)
Entries.Description: Offering of MSRT through Windows Update
Entries.Detail: Controls whether Windows Update offers the Malicious Software Removal Tool scan. Disabling prevents it from being pushed via Windows Update.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Malicious Software Removal Tool offered via Windows Update
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls whether Windows Update offers the Malicious Software Removal Tool scan. Disabling prevents it from being pushed via Windows Update. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.

Entries.Name: Microphone Access
Entries.Detail: Master toggle controlling whether apps can request access to your microphone. Disabling prevents all apps from using the mic.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Microphone access for apps is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Master toggle controlling whether apps can request access to your microphone. Disabling prevents all apps from using the mic. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.

Entries.Name: Microsoft Product Updates
Entries.Description: Receive updates for other Microsoft products via Windows Update
Entries.Detail: When enabled, Windows Update also checks for updates to other Microsoft products like Office. Disabling limits updates to Windows only.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Updates for other Microsoft products are disabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: When enabled, Windows Update also checks for updates to other Microsoft products like Office. Disabling limits updates to Windows only.

Entries.Name: NTFS Last Access Timestamps
Entries.Description: Updating of NTFS last access timestamps
Entries.Detail: Updates a timestamp on every file each time it is read. Disabling reduces disk write activity on systems with many small file reads.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: NTFS last access timestamps are enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Updates a timestamp on every file each time it is read. Disabling reduces disk write activity on systems with many small file reads.

Entries.Name: NTFS Long Paths
Entries.Description: NTFS paths with length over 260 characters
Entries.Detail: Removes the 260-character limit on file paths. Required for some development tools and deeply nested folder structures.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: NTFS paths over 260 characters are disabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Removes the 260-character limit on file paths. Required for some development tools and deeply nested folder structures.

Entries.Name: PowerShell 7 Telemetry
Entries.Detail: PowerShell 7 sends anonymous usage data to Microsoft by default. Disabling opts out of this telemetry. Linked to the Install/Update PowerShell 7 option.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: PowerShell 7 telemetry is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: PowerShell 7 sends anonymous usage data to Microsoft by default. Disabling opts out of this telemetry. Linked to the Install/Update PowerShell 7 option.

Entries.Name: Shared Experiences
Entries.Detail: Allows Windows to share activity between your devices via your Microsoft account. Disabling keeps activity local to this machine only.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Shared Experiences is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Allows Windows to share activity between your devices via your Microsoft account. Disabling keeps activity local to this machine only.

Entries.Name: Sign-in Info After Update
Entries.Description: Use sign-in info to finish setting up after update
Entries.Detail: Uses your sign-in credentials to automatically finish setting up your profile after a Windows update. Disable for more privacy.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Sign-in info used to finish setup after update is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Uses your sign-in credentials to automatically finish setting up your profile after a Windows update. Disable for more privacy.

Entries.Name: Sleep Button
Entries.Description: Sleep start menu and keyboard button
Entries.Detail: Controls whether the Sleep option appears in the Start Menu and whether the sleep keyboard button is active.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Sleep button in Start Menu and keyboard is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls whether the Sleep option appears in the Start Menu and whether the sleep keyboard button is active.

Entries.Name: Superfetch Service
Entries.Detail: SysMain preloads frequently used apps into RAM to speed up launch times. On SSDs it provides little benefit and can usually be safely disabled.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Superfetch (SysMain) service is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: SysMain preloads frequently used apps into RAM to speed up launch times. On SSDs it provides little benefit and can usually be safely disabled. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.

Entries.Name: Tailored Experiences
Entries.Description: Microsoft diagnostic data for personalized tips
Entries.Detail: Uses your diagnostic data to show personalized tips, ads, and recommendations from Microsoft. Disabling opts you out.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Microsoft uses diagnostic data for personalized tips
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Uses your diagnostic data to show personalized tips, ads, and recommendations from Microsoft. Disabling opts you out.

Entries.Name: UWP Account Info
Entries.Description: Account info access from UWP apps
Entries.Detail: Controls whether UWP apps can access your account name, picture, and other account information.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Account info access from UWP apps is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls whether UWP apps can access your account name, picture, and other account information.

Entries.Name: UWP Calendar
Entries.Detail: Controls whether UWP apps can read and write to your calendar data.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Calendar access from UWP apps is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls whether UWP apps can read and write to your calendar data.

Entries.Name: UWP Call History
Entries.Description: Call history access from UWP apps
Entries.Detail: Controls whether UWP apps can read your call history.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Call history access from UWP apps is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls whether UWP apps can read your call history.

Entries.Name: UWP Contacts
Entries.Detail: Controls whether UWP apps can access your contacts list.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Contacts access from UWP apps is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls whether UWP apps can access your contacts list.

Entries.Name: UWP Diagnostic Info
Entries.Description: Diagnostic info access from UWP apps
Entries.Detail: Controls whether UWP apps can collect diagnostic information about your device and its state.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Diagnostic info access from UWP apps is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls whether UWP apps can collect diagnostic information about your device and its state.

Entries.Name: UWP Email
Entries.Detail: Controls whether UWP apps can read and send email on your behalf.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Email access from UWP apps is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls whether UWP apps can read and send email on your behalf.

Entries.Name: UWP File System
Entries.Description: File system access from UWP apps
Entries.Detail: Controls whether UWP apps can access files anywhere on your file system beyond their own app folders.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: File system access from UWP apps is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls whether UWP apps can access files anywhere on your file system beyond their own app folders. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.

Entries.Name: UWP Messaging
Entries.Detail: Controls whether UWP apps can read and send text messages.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Messaging access from UWP apps is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls whether UWP apps can read and send text messages.

Entries.Name: UWP Notifications
Entries.Detail: Controls whether UWP apps can send notifications to the Windows notification center.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Notification access from UWP apps is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls whether UWP apps can send notifications to the Windows notification center.

Entries.Name: UWP Other Devices
Entries.Description: Other devices access from UWP apps
Entries.Detail: Controls whether UWP apps can access other paired devices not covered by more specific categories.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Other devices access from UWP apps is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls whether UWP apps can access other paired devices not covered by more specific categories.

Entries.Name: UWP Phone Calls
Entries.Description: Phone call access from UWP apps
Entries.Detail: Controls whether UWP apps can make and manage phone calls.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Phone call access from UWP apps is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls whether UWP apps can make and manage phone calls.

Entries.Name: UWP Radios (Bluetooth)
Entries.Detail: Controls whether UWP apps can control Bluetooth and other wireless radio devices.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Radios (Bluetooth) access from UWP apps is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls whether UWP apps can control Bluetooth and other wireless radio devices.

Entries.Name: UWP Swap File
Entries.Detail: The UWP swap file (swapfile.sys) is used by Windows Store apps for virtual memory paging. Disabling frees disk space if you do not use Store apps.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: UWP apps swap file (swapfile.sys) is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: The UWP swap file (swapfile.sys) is used by Windows Store apps for virtual memory paging. Disabling frees disk space if you do not use Store apps. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.

Entries.Name: UWP Tasks
Entries.Detail: Controls whether UWP apps can access your task and to-do lists.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Tasks access from UWP apps is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls whether UWP apps can access your task and to-do lists.

Entries.Name: UWP Voice Activation
Entries.Description: Voice activation access from UWP apps
Entries.Detail: Controls whether UWP apps can be activated using voice commands in the background.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Voice activation access from UWP apps is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls whether UWP apps can be activated using voice commands in the background.

Entries.Name: WAP Push Messaging
Entries.Detail: The WAP Push messaging service receives over-the-air messages from mobile carriers. Rarely needed on a PC not connected to a mobile network.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: WAP Push messaging service is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: The WAP Push messaging service receives over-the-air messages from mobile carriers. Rarely needed on a PC not connected to a mobile network.

Entries.Name: Web Language Sync
Entries.Detail: Syncs your preferred language list to a Microsoft server so web content can match your preferences. Disable for more privacy.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Web language list synchronization is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Syncs your preferred language list to a Microsoft server so web content can match your preferences. Disable for more privacy.

Entries.Name: WiFi Sense
Entries.Detail: WiFi Sense can automatically share your WiFi password with your contacts. Disabling prevents this sharing behavior.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Wi-Fi Sense is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: WiFi Sense can automatically share your WiFi password with your contacts. Disabling prevents this sharing behavior.

Entries.Name: Windows Error Reporting
Entries.Detail: When an application crashes, Windows Error Reporting can send a report to Microsoft. Disabling stops this data from leaving your machine.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Windows Error Reporting is enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: When an application crashes, Windows Error Reporting can send a report to Microsoft. Disabling stops this data from leaving your machine.

Entries.Name: Windows Update Auto Downloads
Entries.Detail: Controls whether Windows Update automatically downloads updates in the background. Disabling lets you choose when to download updates.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Windows Update automatic downloads are enabled
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Controls whether Windows Update automatically downloads updates in the background. Disabling lets you choose when to download updates. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
